base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of char_select_st — a ui from 1991 street fighter ii. Super Turbo/Grand Master char-select — adds Akuma hidden-slot. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Super Turbo/Grand Master char-select — adds Akuma hidden-slot
